verdict_reason: High volume (12,100), manageable KD (30), no AI Overview, weak competition (forum + Facebook in top 6), seasonal spring surge timing is perfect, clear tool intent for interactive planting guide
direction: Companion Planting Chart / Interactive Garden Planner

serp_analysis.opportunity_note: Forum and Facebook rank in top 6 — extremely weak competition for such high volume. Almanac.com has a static chart but no interactive tool. Building an interactive companion planting tool with search/filter would crush static charts.

trends.note: Spring seasonal surge — perfect timing to launch in March. Interest peaks March-May as gardeners plan.

monetization.rationale: 12K monthly searches with gardening audience. CPC is low ($0.21) but volume compensates. Affiliate links to seed companies (Burpee, Johnny's Seeds) can boost revenue significantly. Garden tool affiliate programs pay $5-15 per sale.

execution_plan.mvp: Interactive companion planting chart: search any vegetable/herb, see compatible and incompatible companions. Visual grid layout with color coding (green=good, red=bad). Cover 50+ common plants.
execution_plan.content_strategy: Build comprehensive database of plant companion relationships (250+ pairs). Add growing zone calculator, planting calendar by zip code. Create 'What to plant with [X]' pages for each plant for pSEO.
execution_plan.technical_notes: Static site with client-side search. Plant database as JSON. No backend needed for MVP.

source_signals: Google Trends Rising: companion planting chart (new, peak:83)
r/gardening multiple posts about planting season
r/WebGames Plant Anywhere browser garden planner showing demand
